bids.reasoning: At t=0.00 there is no time pressure to concede, and the opponent’s first offer gives me the minimum utility on every issue. I am targeting my maximum-utility bid while establishing my preferred anchor, especially on the high-weight issues issueA and issueB.

I am targeting very high utility because it is still extremely early (t=0.02), so there is little need to concede much yet. The opponent has only made a small concession, moving issueA from valueE to valueD while keeping everything else at valueE, so I will make a minimal concession on a low-weight issue while holding firm on the most important issues.

I am targeting very high utility because it is still extremely early at t=0.04, and the opponent’s offers remain very unfavorable to me with no reliable concession trend. Since they briefly moved only on issueA but then reverted, I will avoid major concessions and only vary a low-importance issue to avoid repeating my last bid exactly.

I am targeting a very high utility bid (~0.96) because it is still very early at t=0.06 and there is no need to make large concessions yet. The opponent’s valid offers remain extremely low for me, with only a small and inconsistent concession on issueA, so I am holding firm on the high-weight issues while conceding slightly on lower-weight issueD and issueE.

I am targeting a high utility around 0.94 because it is still very early (t=0.08), so there is little need to make major concessions yet. The opponent’s offers remain very low for me and show only minimal movement on issueA, so I will hold firm on high-weight issues A, B, and C while conceding slightly on lower-weight issueD/issueE space and avoiding an exact repeat of my last bid.

The opponent’s offers remain very low for me, alternating between all valueE and only a small improvement on issueA, so they have not shown meaningful concession. I am conceding slightly on the lower-weight issues while holding firm on the most important issues A, B, and C.

I am targeting about 0.90 utility, since it is still early at t=0.12 and the opponent has only made very small concessions with offers worth around 0.20-0.26 to me. Their bids suggest they are holding firm, so I will not concede on my high-weight issues A, B, and C yet, but I can make a small additional concession on a low-weight issue while avoiding an exact repeat of my last offer.

I am targeting a high-utility bid around 0.88 because it is still very early in the negotiation, so there is no need to make large concessions yet. The opponent’s offers remain extremely low for me and show only minimal movement on issueA while holding valueE elsewhere, so I will concede only on my lower-weight issuesD and issueE while protecting the high-weight issuesA, issueB, and issueC.

I am targeting a high utility around 0.86 because it is still early in the negotiation and the opponent’s offers remain very low for me, only moving between all valueE and a small concession on issueA. Since the opponent appears to prefer lower-ranked values for me, I am conceding further only on low-weight issues while holding firm on the high-importance issues A, B, and C.

I am targeting a high utility bid around 0.84 because it is still early at t=0.18 and the opponent has not meaningfully improved their offers to me, mostly staying at valueE across issues. I will keep my highest-weight issues A, B, and C at valueA while conceding on the lower-weight issues D and E to signal flexibility without giving up core value.

At t=0.20 it is still early, and the opponent has barely conceded, with their offers only reaching about 0.26 utility for me at best. I will continue holding firm on the highest-weight issues A and B, keep prior concessions on low-weight D and E, and make a modest new concession on issueC to avoid repeating my last bid while targeting around 0.80 utility.

I am targeting a utility around 0.76 by conceding further on issueC while still protecting the high-weight issueA and issueB. I am targeting a utility around 0.72, continuing a gradual concession path while preserving my highest-weight issues A and B at valueA. I targeted about 0.70 utility, continuing a measured concession path while it is still early enough not to give up high-weight issues. I am targeting a moderate utility bid around 0.62: still well above reservation, but more conciliatory than my last offer because the negotiation has already had many rounds by t=0.28. The opponent has mostly held firm at valueE across issues, with only small movement on issueA to valueD, so I am conceding further on issueA while keeping issueB at my top value because it is one of my highest-weight issues. At t=0.44 we are in the mid-game, so I am targeting a modest concession rather than dropping fully to the opponent’s very low-utility standing offer. I am targeting a positive utility of about 0.26 by conceding mainly on issues the opponent has consistently held firm on, while preserving issueA at valueD rather than valueE. This bid matches the opponent’s recurring valid offer pattern and avoids repeating my previous exact bid.
